Learning Path My Portfolio My Certificates My Induction
Eduversal Network · Single source for policy, framework & verbatim text

References

Every framework, audit, handbook, Cambridge standard and Indonesian regulation that the Eduversal network operates on — read-only, in one place. Edits go through the source repos (docs/) and the matching seed scripts; this page is the reading surface.

Audience central_admin · director · coordinator Indexed — Last build —
Recently opened

The 3 handbooks that govern Year-1 induction across all platforms. Source of truth lives in docs/induction/handbook-*.json — Firestore copies in induction_programs/{programId} are reverted on every seed run. Charter Non-Negotiables (NN1–NN5) apply to every handbook here.

Live framework definitions used across KPI, Appraisal and Competency. Many of these are also Firestore-seeded (competency_framework/*, teacher_kpi_config/*) — what you see here is the canonical JSON the seeders read from.

Cross-module integrity audits, mapping documents and forward-looking framework drafts produced during the consistency sweeps. INDEX.md is the entry point — it cross-references every other audit doc.

Verbatim Cambridge text — the primary source every Eduversal framework cross-references. Stored under docs/research/cambridge/ with SHA-256-pinned PDFs. Never duplicate this text inside seed scripts.

Verbatim Indonesian Ministry of Education regulations cited across the framework. Loaded on demand by the cross-reference popovers (cambridge-crossref.js) when SKL / PIGP chips are clicked.

Governance documents: the SQL-style Firestore catalogue, design system tokens, contributing rules and the binding Induction Charter.

Loading…
